title: Song of Kumarbi: The Kingship in Heaven
description: The Hittite succession myth behind Hesiod's Theogony.
introduction: The Hittite succession myth behind Hesiod's Theogony.

translation.text: Formerly Alalu was king in heaven. Anu gave battle to Alalu and defeated him. Then Kumarbi gave battle to Anu. He seized Anu by his feet and bit his loins, and the manhood of Anu united with Kumarbi's insides. Anu said: 'Do not rejoice. I have impregnated you with the Storm God.'
